Emily runs a dog rescue center and currently has 25 dogs. She received 4 puppies from a nearby town on Thursday, 1 stray dog from a family on Friday, and 2 families adopted 3 dogs each on Saturday. The total number of dogs she currently has is [initial_dogs] + [puppies_received] + [stray_dog] + [adoptions]. 

*** 

The initial number of dogs is [initial_dogs], the number of puppies received is [puppies_received], the number of stray dogs is [stray_dog], and the number of adopted dogs is [adoptions]. The total number of dogs in the rescue center is [total_dogs]. 

[total_dogs] is the final count of dogs in the rescue center after all the additions and subtractions. The calculation is [initial_dogs] + [puppies_received] + [stray_dog] + [adoptions] - [adoptions].
